question: ज्या कुटुंबांसाठी 'household split number' १ आहे किंवा 'completion status' 'Located' आहे, अशा कुटुंबांच्या वेगळ्या (distinct) 'geography IDs' ची यादी करा.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 OR T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located';
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
LEFT JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE fhc.household_split_number = 1 OR dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located';
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
LEFT JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE fhc.household_split_number = 1 OR dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located';

question: ज्या सर्व नोंदींमध्ये 'household split number' १ आहे, अशा नोंदींसाठी 'household ID', 'household number', 'household split number' आणि 'state code' यांची यादी करा आणि ती 'household ID' नुसार क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, fact_household_core.household_split_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id;
raw_output: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, fact_household_core.household_split_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांची पूर्णता स्थिती (completion status) 'Located' आहे आणि कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (household split number) १ आहे, अशा कुटुंबांचे भूगोल आयडी (geography IDs) सूचीबद्ध करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1
predicted_sql:
SELECT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1;
raw_output:
SELECT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1;

predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fhc.household_split_number > 0;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fhc.household_split_number > 0;

question: प्रत्येक राज्य कोडसाठी, तो राज्य कोड स्वतः, हाऊसहोल्ड आयडीची (household IDs) एकूण संख्या आणि सरासरी हाऊसहोल्ड स्प्लिट नंबरची (household split number) यादी करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATE_CODE, COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID), AVG(T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T2.STATE_CODE
predicted_sql: SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS total_household_count, AVG(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS average_split_number FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code;
raw_output: SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS total_household_count, AVG(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS average_split_number FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांसाठी नवीन कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (new household split number) शून्यापेक्षा जास्त आहे, अशा सर्वाधिक नोंदी असलेल्या पहिल्या १० जिल्हा संकेतांकांची (district codes) यादी त्यांच्या जिल्हा संकेतांकानुसार गटबद्ध करून द्या.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 0 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS record_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 0
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY record_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS record_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 0
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY record_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: List the geography IDs, ordered ascending by geography ID, for households where either the completion status is 'Located' or the household split number is 1, grouped by their geography ID.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' OR T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ORDER BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1
GROUP BY fact_household_core.geography_id
ORDER BY fact_household_core.geography_id ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1
GROUP BY fact_household_core.geography_id
ORDER BY fact_household_core.geography_id ASC;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांची पूर्णता स्थिती (completion status) 'स्थलांतरित' (Moved out) आहे, अशा कुटुंबांसाठी जिल्हा कोड आणि घरगुती विभाजन क्रमांकांची (household split numbers) एकूण संख्या सूचीबद्ध करा, त्यांचे जिल्हा कोडनुसार वर्गीकरण करा आणि सर्वाधिक संख्या असलेले केवळ पहिले ५ जिल्हे दाखवा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Moved out' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS total_household_split_numbers
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_split_numbers DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS total_household_split_numbers
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_split_numbers DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांची पूर्णता स्थिती 'स्थलांतरित' (Moved out) आहे, अशा कुटुंबांसाठी जिल्हा कोड आणि त्यांच्या घरगुती विभाजन क्रमांकांची (household split numbers) एकूण संख्या जिल्हा कोडनुसार गटबद्ध करून सूचीबद्ध करा आणि सर्वाधिक संख्या असलेले पहिले ५ जिल्हे दाखवा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Moved out' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dgh.district_code, COUNT(fhc.household_split_number) AS total_household_split_numbers
FROM fact_household_core fhc
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dgh ON fhc.geography_id = dgh.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY dgh.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_split_numbers DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांसाठी नवीन कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (new household split number) एकापेक्षा जास्त आहे, अशा कुटुंबांच्या जिल्हा कोडची आणि एकूण कुटुंब आयडींच्या (household IDs) संख्येची यादी करा. ही माहिती जिल्हा कोडनुसार गटबद्ध (grouped) करा आणि पहिल्या १० निकालांसाठी ही संख्या उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा.

gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER <> 0 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) DESC LIMIT 10

question: 'राजस्थान' राज्यातील अशा कुटुंबांसाठी भौगोलिक श्रेणीमधील PSU कोडची यादी करा जिथे पूर्णत्वाची स्थिती (completion status) 'Located' आहे, त्यांच्या PSU कोडनुसार गटबद्ध करा, जेणेकरून त्यांच्या कुटुंबातील स्प्लिट नंबरची एकूण बेरीज नेमकी शून्य असेल आणि निकाल PSU कोडनुसार चढत्या क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.PSU_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T1.STATE_CODE = 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY T1.PSU_CODE HAVING SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) = 0 ORDER BY T1.PSU_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan'
  AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
HAVING SUM(fact_household_core.household_split_number) = 0
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan'
  AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
HAVING SUM(fact_household_core.household_split_number) = 0
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांची पूर्णता स्थिती (completion status) 'Located' आहे, कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (household split number) ० आहे आणि नवीन कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (new household split number) १ आहे, अशा कुटुंबांसाठी युनिक पीएसयू (PSU) कोड चढत्या क्रमाने सूचीबद्ध करा.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.PSU_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 0 AND T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.PSU_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 0
  AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 0
  AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांची स्थिती 'Located' आहे, अशा कुटुंबांचा विचार करून प्रत्येक जिल्ह्यासाठी जिल्हा कोड आणि हाऊसहोल्ड स्प्लिट नंबरची संख्या सूचीबद्ध करा आणि सर्वाधिक संख्या असलेले पहिले ५ जिल्हे दाखवा.

predicted_sql:

JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY household_split_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: ज्या कुटुंबांची पूर्णता स्थिती (completion status) 'स्थलांतरित' (Moved out) आहे, अशा कुटुंबांसाठी जिल्हा कोड आणि नवीन कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांकांची (new household split numbers) गणना करा, त्यांचे जिल्हा कोडनुसार गट करा आणि सर्वाधिक गणना असलेले केवळ पहिले ५ जिल्हे दर्शवा.

JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out' AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 2

ORDER BY new_household_split_count DESC

question: अशा कुटुंबांचे आयडी (IDs) सूचीबद्ध करा ज्यामधील प्रत्येक सदस्याचे वय किमान ४६ वर्षे आहे, आणि विशेषतः अशी कुटुंबे निवडा ज्यामध्ये 'विवाहित' (Married) वैवाहिक स्थिती असलेला एकही सदस्य नाही.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T2 ON T1.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID WHERE T1.AGE >= 46 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T2.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 46 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 END) = 0;
raw_output:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 46 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 END) = 0;

raw_output:

question: प्रत्येक लिंग कोडसाठी, लिंग कोडची नोंद करा आणि व्यक्तींच्या सरासरी वयाची गणना करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SEX_CODE, AVG(T2.AGE) FROM DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID GROUP BY T1.SEX_CODE
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_demographic_codes.sex_code, AVG(fact_person_core.age) AS average_age
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY dim_demographic_codes.sex_code;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_demographic_codes.sex_code, AVG(fact_person_core.age) AS average_age
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY dim_demographic_codes.sex_code;

question: ज्या रेकॉर्ड्सचा 'हाऊसहोल्ड स्प्लिट नंबर' (household split number) १ आहे, अशा पहिल्या १० रेकॉर्ड्सची वये आणि 'हाऊसहोल्ड स्प्लिट नंबर' यांची यादी करा आणि ती वयानुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने (सर्वात जास्त ते सर्वात कमी) लावा.

LIMIT 10;

WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY fact_person_core.age DESC

question: ज्या कुटुंबांचा 'household split number' शून्य नाही अशा सर्व कुटुंबांचा 'household ID', 'household number' आणि 'state code' यांची यादी करा, प्रत्येक गटात किमान एक 'household status ID' रेकॉर्ड असल्याची खात्री करा आणि निकाल 'household ID' नुसार चढत्या क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER != 0 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC

raw_output:
SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code
FROM fact_household_core
INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number != 0
  AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;

question: अशा कुटुंबांचे आयडी (IDs) सूचीबद्ध करा ज्यांमधील सर्व सदस्यांचे वय किमान २२ वर्षे आहे, परंतु विशेषतः फक्त अशीच कुटुंबे निवडा ज्यांमधील कोणत्याही सदस्याची वैवाहिक स्थिती 'विवाहित' नाही.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.AGE >= 22 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T3 WHERE T3.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID AND T3.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 22 AND MAX(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;
raw_output:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 22 AND MAX(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;

question: सर्वात जास्त वय असलेल्या पहिल्या १० व्यक्तींचे वय आणि त्यांच्या कुटुंबाचा स्प्लिट नंबर (household split number) सूचीबद्ध करा, विशेषतः ज्यांच्या कुटुंबाचा स्प्लिट नंबर १ आहे.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE, T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.AGE DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_person_core.age, fact_household_core.household_split_number FROM fact_person_core JOIN fact_household_core ON fact_person_core.household_id = fact_household_core.household_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 ORDER BY fact_person_core.age DESC LIMIT 10;
raw_output: SELECT fact_person_core.age, fact_household_core.household_split_number FROM fact_person_core JOIN fact_household_core ON fact_person_core.household_id = fact_household_core.household_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 ORDER BY fact_person_core.age DESC LIMIT 10;

question: ज्या सर्व कुटुंबांसाठी नवीन कुटुंब विभाजन क्रमांक (household split number) शून्य नाही आणि किमान एक कुटुंब स्थिती आयडी (household status ID) नोंदवलेला आहे, अशा सर्व कुटुंबांचा कुटुंब आयडी (household ID), कुटुंब क्रमांक आणि जिल्हा कोड यांची यादी करा आणि ती कुटुंब आयडीनुसार चढत्या क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.DISTRICT_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER != 0 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number <> 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;
raw_output: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number <> 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;

question: २२ वर्षे किंवा त्याहून अधिक वयोगटातील व्यक्तींच्या 'पर्सन कोअर' रेकॉर्डमधील अशा हाऊसहोल्ड आयडींची (Household IDs) यादी करा, ज्यामध्ये 'विवाहित' (Married) वैवाहिक स्थिती असलेली एकही व्यक्ती नाही आणि हे निकाल हाऊसहोल्ड आयडीनुसार क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE ON FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID = FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE FACT_PERSON_CORE.AGE >= 22 AND FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID NOT IN (SELECT FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE JOIN DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES ON FACT_PERSON_CORE.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID WHERE DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married') ORDER BY FACT_PERSON_CORE.HOUSEHOLD_ID
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_person_core.household_id
FROM fact_person_core
WHERE fact_person_core.age >= 22
AND fact_person_core.household_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT fact_person_core.household_id
    FROM fact_person_core
    JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
    WHERE dim_demographic_codes.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married'
)
ORDER BY fact_person_core.household_id;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_person_core.household_id
FROM fact_person_core
WHERE fact_person_core.age >= 22
AND fact_person_core.household_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT fact_person_core.household_id
    FROM fact_person_core
    JOIN dim_demographic_codes ON fact_person_core.demographic_code_id = dim_demographic_codes.demographic_code_id
    WHERE dim_demographic_codes.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married'
)
ORDER BY fact_person_core.household_id;

question: प्रत्येक व्यक्तीचा आयडी (ID) आणि कुटुंबाच्या विभाजनाच्या क्रमांकासाठी (household split number), जास्तीत जास्त वय आणि कुटुंबाच्या विभाजनाचा क्रमांक शोधा, ज्यामध्ये जास्तीत जास्त वय १३ पेक्षा जास्त आहे असे निकाल निवडा, आणि जास्तीत जास्त वयानुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने पहिल्या १० निकालांची यादी करा.
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(T2.AGE), T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.PERSON_ID HAVING MAX(T2.AGE) > 13 ORDER BY MAX(T2.AGE) DESC LIMIT 10;
predicted_sql:
SELECT fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number, MAX(fact_person_core.age) AS max_age
FROM fact_person_core
JOIN fact_household_core ON fact_person_core.household_id = fact_household_core.household_id
GROUP BY fact_person_core.person_id, fact_household_core.household_split_number
HAVING MAX(fact_person_core.age) > 13
ORDER BY max_age DESC
LIMIT 10;
